name: DSCC Breaking News
subject: Republicans release Obamacare repeal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
House Republicans just released their plan to repeal Obamacare. Here's what you need to know: House Republicans just released their plan to repeal Obamacare. Here's what you need to know:
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3e3/2b07114c/5b2cc465/736bac68/326688636/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-obamacare?source=PT-20170306-Breaking-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
Friend --

House Republicans just released their plan to repeal Obamacare. Here's what you need to know:

It forces millions of Americans to pay more for less care. The wealthy receive massive new tax breaks while hardworking Americans bear soaring new costs. Planned Parenthood will be defunded.

It rolls back our progress to make pre-existing conditions a burden of the past, and reinstates that comprehensive health care is only a privilege the wealthy can afford.

**We will fight until this bill is defeated, but we need to act fast before Republicans bring it to the floor and move it to President Trump 's desk.**

**[Add your name to show how many Democrats are standing up for the healthcare Americans deserve.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3e3/2b07114c/5b2cc465/736bac68/326688636/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-obamacare?source=PT-20170306-Breaking-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

This legislation was crafted in such a way so as to minimize any public scrutiny and nonpartisan analysis.

Now GOP leaders want to ram this bill through before voters have time to process what a disaster it is.

We need your help to to spread the word about exactly what the Republicans are trying to do.

**[Add your name to protect affordable care for all.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3e3/2b07114c/5b2cc465/736bac68/326688636/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-obamacare?source=PT-20170306-Breaking-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Thanks,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on donations, friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=PT-20170306-Breaking-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3e3/2b07114c/5b2cc465/736bac6a/326688636/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3e3/2b07114c/5b2cc465/736bac65/326688636/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e3e3/2b07114c/5b2cc465/736bac64/326688636/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Make your voice heard!
body:
Encourage your congressmen to stand for faith and freedom on
Capitol Hill.

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

Today, you have a unique opportunity to make
your voice for faith and freedom heard on Capitol Hill - by
signing your name to a letter that will be delivered directly to
your senators and representative in Congress.

Many influential Christians have also signed
this letter, like Dr. David Jeremiah, Dr. Tony Evans, Rev. Samuel
Rodriguez, Dr. Alveda King, and Pastor J.D. Greear, to name a
few.

The letter informs your congressmen that you
expect them to stand and act for:

Religious freedom for all

Sanctity and dignity of human life

Protection and strengthening of the
family and marriage

Compassion and care for the least of
those in our society

Once you add your name, I'll deliver the
letter along with a personalized American Patriot's Bible to each
of your congressmen.

Yes, that's right!

Together with millions of believers like you
from around the country, we're going to give every single U.S.
representative and senator a customized Bible with an inscription
from you and My Faith Votes.

Can you think of a better gift of wisdom to
offer them as they lead our nation - or a more powerful reminder
of these four biblical principles that we are asking Congress to
uphold?

So please make your voice heard today by
signing this letter to your congressmen.

Faith makes America stronger,

Jason Yates
Chief Executive Officer
My Faith Votes

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWAHh69lON

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWAHh69lON

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

subject: re: the GOP's "replacement" plan
body:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c46b/4067b0a/2d07938e7/7e7f7af7/4195412420/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170307_dnc_v2s1&source=em_20170307_dnc_v2s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c46b/4067b0a/2d07938e7/7e7f7af4/4195412420/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170307_dnc_v2s1&source=em_20170307_dnc_v2s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c46b/4067b0a/2d07938e7/7e7f7af5/4195412420/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170307_dnc_v2s1&source=em_20170307_dnc_v2s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c46b/4067b0a/2d07938e7/7e7f7af2/4195412420/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170307_dnc_v2s1&source=em_20170307_dnc_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Ronna=20McDaniel?=
subject: What do you want to see?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Take our Chairwoman’s Survey for the 2017 year. |

Friend, Our Party belongs to you. While I might be your chairwoman, our Party wouldn’t last a second without the dedicated conservatives who power our movement. So as I begin serving as your chairwoman, I want to be certain that I’m tackling the issues you care about, picking the fights you think are important, and that I’m representing the values you cherish the most. I want you to be proud of your Party, Friend. But to be your voice on the national stage, I’ll need to know what you want me to prioritize. Please take the Chairwoman’s Survey to say what you want me to prioritize as I help fight for you as your chairwoman. We won the 2016 election because we ran a campaign of, for, and by the people. And that’s exactly how we’re going to run our Party under my leadership. I promise to talk to the grassroots of our country and to listen to the many Americans who had been silenced in the shadows. I also promise to fight back against Democrats and the liberal media when our values are put at risk. But I can’t do it alone. I can’t do it unless you step up and help shape our Party’s mission by completing the Chairwoman's survey now. Thank you, Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel
TAKE THE SURVEY

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecbbaBA-rQHTAfCJmWfaF0GsDRMN6aaaaLWNdBML21Jda?t=2@0-0789&d=eoxhmkjr76_hlbhm.bpl&m=f&y=

clean_body: Take our Chairwoman’s Survey for the 2017 year. | Friend, Our Party belongs to you. While I might be your chairwoman, our Party wouldn’t last a second without the dedicated conservatives who power our movement. So as I begin serving as your chairwoman, I want to be certain that I’m tackling the issues you care about, picking the fights you think are important, and that I’m representing the values you cherish the most. I want you to be proud of your Party, Friend. But to be your voice on the national stage, I’ll need to know what you want me to prioritize. Please take the Chairwoman’s Survey to say what you want me to prioritize as I help fight for you as your chairwoman. We won the 2016 election because we ran a campaign of, for, and by the people. And that’s exactly how we’re going to run our Party under my leadership. I promise to talk to the grassroots of our country and to listen to the many Americans who had been silenced in the shadows. I also promise to fight back against Democrats and the liberal media when our values are put at risk. But I can’t do it alone. I can’t do it unless you step up and help shape our Party’s mission by completing the Chairwoman's survey now. Thank you, Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel TAKE THE SURVEY Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

name: BREAKING NEWS (via @FlaDems)
subject: GOP plan REVEALED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
| The GOP JUST released their plan to 'replace' Obamacare last night - and the truth is it's just as bad as we thought it would be.

Millions stand to pay more and receive less coverage - maybe even LOSE it - because of the GOP's health care plan.

If Americans aren't united to stand up for the ACA, the GOP's plan could pass and devastate MILLIONS of Americans.

**[That is why we need to get 10,000 signatures in the next 48 hours to send the GOP a message that we're standing up for the millions of Americans who got health care for the first time under the ACA. Can you click here to add your name and join us?](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b235/1a5213b3/76c0f8c7/718baccb/3395360075/VEsH/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/save-aca?source=em030717&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+That+is+why+we+need+to+get+10000+signatu&utm_campaign=em030717_1_ACA&refcode=em030717_1_ACA")**

Thanks for all you do,

FlaDems.com
---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b235/1a5213b3/76c0f8c7/718bacca/3395360075/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI3NmMwZjhjNyIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6Ijc3YjRiMjM1In0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/76c0f8c7/77b4b235?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=em030717_1_ACA&source=em030717_1_ACA&refcode=em030717_1_ACA") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: DNC War Room
subject: re: your iPhone
body:
Tell the GOP not to repeal Obamacare
---
**Add your name: stand with Democrats to protect the Affordable Care Act.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-the-GOP-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170307_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170307_dnc2_nd")**
Friend --

This morning, in his defense of the GOP's Obamacare "replacement" plan, Republican Rep. Jason Chaffetz said that Americans would need to choose between "getting that new iPhone that they just love" and health insurance.

That's beyond offensive.

Before the Affordable Care Act became law, too many Americans had to make the difficult decisions to put off checkups or skip refilling a prescription. They weren't saving up for a fancy new phone -- they were choosing between putting food on the table or paying their medical bills.

The GOP's plan will take us back to that reality. Millions of Americans will lose their health coverage (even insurance they get from their employer) under this plan, and the cost of health care will skyrocket for millions more.

**They're counting on us to stand up to out-of-touch Republicans like Jason Chaffetz. If you're ready to fight back, add your name:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-the-GOP-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170307_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170307_dnc2_nd")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c476/4067b0a/2dfe72366/7e7f6df4/2069780082/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170307_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170307_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c476/4067b0a/2dfe72366/7e7f6df5/2069780082/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170307_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170307_dnc2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c476/4067b0a/2dfe72366/7e7f6df2/2069780082/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170307_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170307_dnc2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c476/4067b0a/2dfe72366/7e7f6df3/2069780082/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170307_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170307_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Republicans, are you ready to win in November?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
I need your help to bring new leadership to Richmond.
---
| | | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujni-pixLCcjOoJf9JElqdtlIXrZxGSPFFXGqvuM1Xz7J_PritEeFnZjYfkk-Ig2xn7EhTANfWYdns83ZND2PDJzcYpz3sr4lZsGemcBef6l1ja4dk6JjcUYLc3EBEGYi4e4GKWe3x38lwL9jNbtfwDJDG5fVOOxPjEvGu6A37r-vW961RF3TTGb_E_hsjLitWfuKw3PSJdHQIEpsmzCYO3uDzk2KxtUCiP1NBwoT4IiMCsfAPI7SANaDJcUFZbqBWwF-LgEKaA=&c=de2Yzw1BTfdSM44z3GtIZnR5nVpW6g_HwLe_ixVrBPBoij00wjecHQ==&ch=sIRChOFFniN2S80RUNhRaDSF8M1rFI7hhKb9eXWUwSQO4R-dRe1fog==)
---
| | |
---
| Dear Peter,2017 is shaping up to be a tremendous year for conservatives in Virginia.During this year's legislative session, I proudly carried a number of bills to improve the economy and expand our freedom.With the help of my colleagues, we passed a sweeping Regulatory Rollback Amendment which would allow the House and Senate to roll back outdated and burdensome regulations with a joint vote.In the Senate, I introduced a groundbreaking tax reform proposal which would automatically refund budget surpluses back to taxpayers and reduce rates when economic growth produces steady surpluses.These are two key planks in my platform for making Virginia the #1 state to do business and create jobs.Our good work did not end there.I carried numerous bills to protect women, address opioids, expand agriculture (hemp and aquaculture) improve job access for the disability community, implement redistricting reform, and provide the state budget online.I also carried three strong pro-Second Amendment bills - the most of anyone in Virginia's Senate.I introduced two key ethics reform proposals as well - a plan to ban gifts to lawmakers from lobbyists and special interests, and a bill prohibiting candidates from using campaign funds for personal expenses.With Session over and the June 13th primary election a few short months away, our team is busy taking our platform on the road as I campaign across the Commonwealth to be Virginia's next Lieutenant Governor.
[Would you support our efforts by contributing $50, $25, or even $10 online to help us get our positive message out to an even broader audience?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujni-pixLCcjOoJf9JElqdtlIXrZxGSPFFXGqvuM1Xz7J_PritEeFnZjYfkk-Ig2xn7EhTANfWYdns83ZND2PDJzcYpz3sr4lZsGemcBef6l1ja4dk6JjcUYLc3EBEGYi4e4GKWe3x38lwL9jNbtfwDJDG5fVOOxPjEvGu6A37r-vW961RF3TTGb_E_hsjLitWfuKw3PSJdHQIEpsmzCYO3uDzk2KxtUCiP1NBwoT4IiMCsfAPI7SANaDJcUFZbqBWwF-LgEKaA=&c=de2Yzw1BTfdSM44z3GtIZnR5nVpW6g_HwLe_ixVrBPBoij00wjecHQ==&ch=sIRChOFFniN2S80RUNhRaDSF8M1rFI7hhKb9eXWUwSQO4R-dRe1fog==)Already my conservative message is uniting Republicans who are ready for new leadership in Richmond.[I was honored to win the Prince William County GOP's straw poll last Saturday, with over 57% of the vote.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujni-pixLCcjOoJf9JElqdtlIXrZxGSPFFXGqvuM1Xz7J_PritEeFnZjYfkk-Ig2dI3AqHYnq3cUVvZMGpStHm1ZLK7rE06kM8qCxtQh6bbt0RhwZi8q8yzgVMli3UK8Sm_IBLUVXfn0oEpf9iBTOR8qY8A-3d5DOMy3fYnt252xQfchPHeIXHRMfnlDJSpWtJbby6IrGOw9HpfwGDqkq1jQWVikH87LoextUTGDocsGzjerwlnt2z79__ybSDaP0bpU-UrsFTfoTZ6u36zRfrwgtyWzlPcQ&c=de2Yzw1BTfdSM44z3GtIZnR5nVpW6g_HwLe_ixVrBPBoij00wjecHQ==&ch=sIRChOFFniN2S80RUNhRaDSF8M1rFI7hhKb9eXWUwSQO4R-dRe1fog==)Virginians are ready for a change after three tough years in which our business competitiveness fell to 13th in the nation and our growth rate fell to 48th.I need your help on this campaign to make that change.Every day we are hard at work campaigning across Virginia, looking forward to the November victory we know can be ours with a committed grassroots following and bold conservative ideas. Peter, would you help support our campaign efforts by [contributing $50, $25, or even $10 right now](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujni-pixLCcjOoJf9JElqdtlIXrZxGSPFFXGqvuM1Xz7J_PritEeFnZjYfkk-Ig2xn7EhTANfWYdns83ZND2PDJzcYpz3sr4lZsGemcBef6l1ja4dk6JjcUYLc3EBEGYi4e4GKWe3x38lwL9jNbtfwDJDG5fVOOxPjEvGu6A37r-vW961RF3TTGb_E_hsjLitWfuKw3PSJdHQIEpsmzCYO3uDzk2KxtUCiP1NBwoT4IiMCsfAPI7SANaDJcUFZbqBWwF-LgEKaA=&c=de2Yzw1BTfdSM44z3GtIZnR5nVpW6g_HwLe_ixVrBPBoij00wjecHQ==&ch=sIRChOFFniN2S80RUNhRaDSF8M1rFI7hhKb9eXWUwSQO4R-dRe1fog==)?America charted a new course last November.With your help, I know we can chart a new course in Virginia, too.

---
| | |
---|---
|

| Jill Vogel

P. S., If you cannot [contribute $50, $25, or even $10](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujni-pixLCcjOoJf9JElqdtlIXrZxGSPFFXGqvuM1Xz7J_PritEeFnZjYfkk-Ig2xn7EhTANfWYdns83ZND2PDJzcYpz3sr4lZsGemcBef6l1ja4dk6JjcUYLc3EBEGYi4e4GKWe3x38lwL9jNbtfwDJDG5fVOOxPjEvGu6A37r-vW961RF3TTGb_E_hsjLitWfuKw3PSJdHQIEpsmzCYO3uDzk2KxtUCiP1NBwoT4IiMCsfAPI7SANaDJcUFZbqBWwF-LgEKaA=&c=de2Yzw1BTfdSM44z3GtIZnR5nVpW6g_HwLe_ixVrBPBoij00wjecHQ==&ch=sIRChOFFniN2S80RUNhRaDSF8M1rFI7hhKb9eXWUwSQO4R-dRe1fog==), would you consider supporting our campaign by [ordering your free, removable bumper sticker online](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujni-pixLCcjOoJf9JElqdtlIXrZxGSPFFXGqvuM1Xz7J_PritEeFiSGKnISkBipCCW1_n6nFKeYCUI3AwhUuIgayYi0Q_XwDBwLYtfVh3jnAG6LAEqSFzaQyK5AZsGQfVif30XXEAbEjrvI4O-MHR3-cmY19sdi3Lc_n_rYSaMb-MZh9PCkALSJlrO51MF9RBYFx_Ym4hWEUm6NrIqPsA==&c=de2Yzw1BTfdSM44z3GtIZnR5nVpW6g_HwLe_ixVrBPBoij00wjecHQ==&ch=sIRChOFFniN2S80RUNhRaDSF8M1rFI7hhKb9eXWUwSQO4R-dRe1fog==)? Did you know that one bumper sticker is worth the equivalent of $200 in campaign advertising?[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujni-pixLCcjOoJf9JElqdtlIXrZxGSPFFXGqvuM1Xz7J_PritEeFlHrZAi7sOs9nnC_AgjfoJHTQF5ajvBws76rn2GtK-z7IWVzyyxoTwR3EDqO6WpBxw9pM6MjpscsGo6zxXYcm6Dkrtc4D_mQMWv3i3p6EI2IKg5iIkw5Lhu9nElbNol7cA==&c=de2Yzw1BTfdSM44z3GtIZnR5nVpW6g_HwLe_ixVrBPBoij00wjecHQ==&ch=sIRChOFFniN2S80RUNhRaDSF8M1rFI7hhKb9eXWUwSQO4R-dRe1fog==)

---
| |
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186

---
| Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates

---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujni-pixLCcjOoJf9JElqdtlIXrZxGSPFFXGqvuM1Xz7J_PritEeFh582SQk3xvAkC_AF7uo13gm0ae6IKi1-5rVjnp-Lp9RbiLfAd24lkYfFGsajB648rlxEWL8FfYH9BnCm5fYRuD72IC__cw85ndSP97AEJ2IfyYENDFggZQ=&c=de2Yzw1BTfdSM44z3GtIZnR5nVpW6g_HwLe_ixVrBPBoij00wjecHQ==&ch=sIRChOFFniN2S80RUNhRaDSF8M1rFI7hhKb9eXWUwSQO4R-dRe1fog==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ujni-pixLCcjOoJf9JElqdtlIXrZxGSPFFXGqvuM1Xz7J_PritEeFh582SQk3xvAGRs2l4BmnBD8op0Imgpnp1A0Wm_kSabpKn0NNAlwzbpE_qiZNxcIHQlbsWqi0uGk7SjvNJtpNstXB5tgLRThJckM2wHzK0eH&c=de2Yzw1BTfdSM44z3GtIZnR5nVpW6g_HwLe_ixVrBPBoij00wjecHQ==&ch=sIRChOFFniN2S80RUNhRaDSF8M1rFI7hhKb9eXWUwSQO4R-dRe1fog==)

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: FWD: Getting dark money out of politics (add your name)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd19/2a380d31/15f49146/feedca/287114912/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd19/2a380d31/15f49146/feedca/287114912/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Did you see this, everyone?
Our petition calling on Congress to overturn the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision closes at midnight tonight, and your name seems to be missing.
With the Koch Brothers already pledging to spend up to $400 million against Democrats in 2018, it's really important that you add your voice.
[**Please, sign before tonight's deadline to join Maggie and call on Congress to undo _Citizens United_ and get dark money out of our elections.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd19/2a380d31/15f49146/feedcb/287114912/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/endcitizensunited?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201702_ecuja")
Thanks for doing your part,
Team Maggie
_\-----------Original Message-----------_
On Monday, March 6, 2017 at 8:49 AM, Team Maggie
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:
Hi there,
One of Senator Hassan's first acts in Congress was to cosponsor a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_ , the disastrous Supreme Court decision that lets corporate special interests silence your voice and buy our elections.
It's simple -- our democracy should not be for sale to the highest bidder.
The good news is, you can join Senator Hassan and tell Congress to end _Citizens United_ by signing our petition. **It looks like you haven't had a chance to add your name yet, and the petition closes tomorrow. [Put your name down now, before the deadline, to say that you want to get dark money out of our elections](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd19/2a380d31/15f49146/feedcb/287114912/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/endcitizensunited?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201702_ecuja").**
Washington Republican groups -- including ones tied to the Koch Brothers -- have already pledged to spend up to $400 million to unseat Democrats in 2018. It has never been more important for you to make your voice heard.
[**Please, add your name before tomorrow's deadline to tell Congress to end _Citizens United_.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd19/2a380d31/15f49146/feedcb/287114912/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/endcitizensunited?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201702_ecuja")
Thank you,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd19/2a380d31/15f49146/feea34/287114912/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzAyX2VjdWphIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzAyMjZfZWN1amFfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201702_ecuja?refcode=e20170226_ecuja_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd19/2a380d31/15f49146/feea35/287114912/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Concord, NH 03302 United States

With the Koch Brothers already pledging to spend up to $400 million against Democrats in 2018, it's really important that you add your voice. "" Thanks for doing your part, Team Maggie \-----------Original Message----------- On Monday, March 6, 2017 at 8:49 AM, Team Maggie <info@maggiehassan.com> wrote: Hi there, One of Senator Hassan's first acts in Congress was to cosponsor a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United , the disastrous Supreme Court decision that lets corporate special interests silence your voice and buy our elections. It's simple -- our democracy should not be for sale to the highest bidder. The good news is, you can join Senator Hassan and tell Congress to end Citizens United by signing our petition. It looks like you haven't had a chance to add your name yet, and the petition closes tomorrow. "". Washington Republican groups -- including ones tied to the Koch Brothers -- have already pledged to spend up to $400 million to unseat Democrats in 2018. It has never been more important for you to make your voice heard. "" Thank you, Team Maggie ""

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: Cutting every single dollar from Planned Parenthood >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c09/24c69fd9/f4530673/18e0b20a/3870566325/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all&source=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all")
---

Peter,

After years of talking about it, House Republicans finally unveiled their plan to repeal Obamacare -- **and it's even worse than we feared.**

The plan is so anti-choice that it would effectively shut down ANY private coverage for abortion.

**[Stopping this bill is going to take every single one of us stepping up now. Add your name immediately to protect Obamacare and Planned Parenthood.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c09/24c69fd9/f4530673/18e0b20b/3870566325/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170307_email_RepealResponse?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Stopping+this+bill+is+going+to+take+ever&utm_campaign=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all&source=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all")**

Here are just some of the things the House Republicans' Obamacare repeal would do:
* Strip _every single dollar_ of federal funding from Planned Parenthood -- jeopardizing access to lifesaving health services for millions
* Eliminate the federal requirement to cover maternity care, making maternity care unaffordable for many, if available at all
* Roll back the Medicaid expansion that's helped millions of women and families get covered
* Ramp up giveaways to the wealthiest Americans like insurance company CEOs while slashing aid for those who need it most
* Allow insurance companies to charge the elderly up to _five times more_ for the same coverage as younger people

Make no mistake: If House Republicans have their way, the impact would be catastrophic -- and immediate -- for millions of women and families nationwide.

We have to speak up against this bill now.

Pro-choice Democratic women in the House like Nancy Pelosi and Val Demings are fighting back against this terrible plan. But they need the voices of this five-million-person community to join them -- loudly.

**Add your name now to stand up against the House Republicans' plan to defund Planned Parenthood and repeal Obamacare:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Get-Loud](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c09/24c69fd9/f4530673/18e0b204/3870566325/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170307_email_RepealResponse?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgGetLoud&utm_campaign=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all&source=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

****[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c09/24c69fd9/f4530673/18e0b205/3870566325/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170307_email_RepealResponse-up?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all&source=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all")****

****
|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c09/24c69fd9/f4530673/18e0b206/3870566325/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all&source=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c09/24c69fd9/f4530673/18e0b207/3870566325/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all&source=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7c09/24c69fd9/f4530673/18e0b200/3870566325/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all&source=WQENE307N_digital_email_20170307_RepealResponse_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
